titles.title: I will follow - Where you go I go

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All your ways are good All your ways are sure I will trust in you alone Higher than my side High above my life I will trust in you alone

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Where you go, I'll go Where you stay, I'll stay When you move, I'll move I will follow you Who you love, I'll love How you serve I'll serve If this life I lose, I will follow you I will follow you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Light unto the world Light unto my life I will live for you alone You're the one I seek Knowing I will find All I need in you alone, in you alone

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In you there's life everlasting In you there's freedom for my soul In you there's joy, unending joy And I will follow
